linting.notes: No Python linting configured (no ruff, flake8, pylint, mypy, or black). Frontend uses Biome for fast linting and formatting. Makefile has a 'lint' target that only runs frontend lint.

testing.fixtures_location: tests/conftest.py (session-level fixtures for OpenSearch, session manager, test documents)
testing.mock_patterns: Uses pytest-mock for mocking. Session-level onboarding fixture creates test app.
testing.notes: Tests are split into unit/ (no external deps, 73 tests) and integration/ (requires OpenSearch, Langflow, docling-serve). Integration tests need full stack: make test-ci or make test-ci-local. E2E tests use Playwright in frontend/ directory. SDK tests in tests/integration/sdk/ require running stack at localhost:3000.

gating_checks.name: Frontend Lint (Biome)
gating_checks.command: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run lint

gating_checks.name: Integration Tests
gating_checks.command: make test-ci-local (builds all images locally, runs core + SDK integration tests)

ci.notes: Integration tests run on self-hosted ARM64 runners. E2E tests run on ubuntu-latest. Integration tests build all images locally on PR, pull from DockerHub on workflow_dispatch. Tests require OpenSearch with OIDC, Langflow, docling-serve, and generated JWT keys.

build.install_command: uv sync --group dev && cd frontend && npm ci
build.build_command: make build (builds all Docker images: OpenSearch, backend, frontend, Langflow)
build.notes: Project uses uv for Python dependency management (modern, fast alternative to pip/poetry). Frontend is Next.js. Container images built via Dockerfile, Dockerfile.backend, Dockerfile.frontend, Dockerfile.langflow. Makefile provides rich targets: dev (full stack with GPU), dev-cpu (CPU only), test, test-ci, etc.

conventions.test_file_pattern: tests/**/*.py for Python, frontend/**/*.test.ts* for TypeScript
conventions.test_naming: Python: test_* functions, TypeScript: describe/it/test blocks
conventions.import_style: Python: absolute imports from src/, TypeScript: relative and @/ alias imports
conventions.notes: Conventional commits required for PR titles (feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|build|ci|chore|revert). Python requires 3.13+. Node requires 20+. Uses detect-secrets to prevent credential leaks.

lint_commands.command: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run lint
lint_commands.notes: Passed with warnings (exit code 0). Biome found console.log usage, any types, missing deps.

test_commands.notes: 73 tests passed in 1.33s. No external dependencies required.
Requires OpenSearch, Langflow, docling-serve. Use 'make test-ci-local' for full setup.

container_recipe.notes: Python 3.13 is required (specified in pyproject.toml and .python-version). Frontend requires Node 20+. Integration tests need complex infrastructure setup - recommend using 'make test-ci-local' which handles all service orchestration.

results.output_snippet:

results.notes: All unit tests passed. Tests cover encryption, env management, langflow utils, OAuth, OpenSearch, task service.

results.command: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run lint
results.output_snippet: Biome found warnings (console.log, any types, useEffect deps), Next.js lint found react-hooks warnings. Exit code 0.
results.notes: Lint passed with warnings. CI accepts warnings as passing.

validation.summary: install OK, unit tests OK (73 passed), frontend lint OK (warnings but exit 0)

gaps: No Python linting configured - no ruff, flake8, pylint, mypy, or black in pyproject.toml or pre-commit
Integration tests require complex infrastructure: OpenSearch with OIDC configuration, Langflow, docling-serve, JWT key generation
E2E tests require Playwright browsers and running full stack
SDK integration tests require external running stack at localhost:3000
Tests require environment variables for OpenSearch password, OAuth credentials (or empty for no-auth mode)
No CI workflow for Python backend linting - only frontend is linted in CI
Integration tests run on self-hosted ARM64 runners - not reproducible on standard x86_64 machines without modification
